name: Eydie Gormé
description: American pop singer, chanteuse, comic actress (1928-2013)
abstract: Eydie Gormé ( EE-dee; born Edith Gormezano; August 16, 1928 – August 10, 2013) was an American singer who achieved notable success in pop, Latin, and jazz genres. She sang solo and in the duo Steve and Eydie with her husband, Steve Lawrence, on albums and television.

about_quotes.speaker: Quincy Jones
about_quotes.evidence: Andy Williams was on “The Tonight Show.” Nobody knew who he was then. He’d left – followed Eydie Gormé and Steve Lawrence on “The Tonight Show.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Quincy Jones — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
